message:
Running command: # All pass! Now test the remaining scenarios
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ_NAME in XIP SRAM IRQ DMA PINMUX SYS_RESET; do
  iverilog -g2005-sv \
    -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
    -DTEST_SEQ_${SEQ_NAME} \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -o /tmp/test_${SEQ_NAME,,}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "${SEQ_NAME}: compile errors={}"
done

# Test DEFAULT (systick/fw_boot scenarios)
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_default.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "DEFAULT: compile errors={}"

# Test RAND_SYS  
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -DTEST_SEQ_RAND_SYS \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_rand_sys.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "RAND_SYS: compile errors={}"

# Test CONTENTION
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -DTEST_SEQ_CONTENTION \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_contention.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "CONTENTION: compile errors={}"

echo "all compiled"

{"command": "# All pass! Now test the remaining scenarios
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ_NAME in XIP SRAM IRQ DMA PINMUX SYS_RESET; do
  iverilog -g2005-sv \

    -o /tmp/test_${SEQ_NAME,,}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "${SEQ_NAME}: compile errors={}"
done

# Test DEFAULT (systick/fw_boot scenarios)
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_default.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "DEFAULT: compile errors={}"

# Test RAND_SYS  
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -DTEST_SEQ_RAND_SYS \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_rand_sys.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "RAND_SYS: compile errors={}"

# Test CONTENTION
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
  -DTEST_SEQ_CONTENTION \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
  -o /tmp/test_contention.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "CONTENTION: compile errors={}"

echo "all compiled"", "timeout": 120}
function.name: execute_bash
